title: Joseph Joseph Folio Icon, 8-Piece Colour coded Knife and Chopping Board Set, Slimline case for organised Kitchen Storage - Large, Multicolour
features: 4 food-specific, non-slip chopping boards plus 4 knives
Stylish case for easy-access and organised storage
Elevate knives with Japanese stainless-steel blades and integrated tool rests to improve hygiene and reduce mess
Knives included: 3.5" Paring knife; 4.5" Serrated knife; 5.5" Santoku knife; 6.5" Chef's knife
